overview: The Wausau Board of Public Works held its regular meeting on July 8, 2026, quickly approving several contractor pay estimates for ongoing street construction and utility projects, as well as three concrete contractor licenses. All items passed unanimously with no notable debate or public comment, reflecting routine project payment approvals significant to infrastructure progress in the city.

agenda.item: Approval of Minutes from June 30, 2026 regular meeting
Item A: 2025 Street Construction Project – Randolph Street/Cherry Street, Hawsuns Incorporated, Pay Estimate #10
Item B: 2026 Street Construction Project B – North 8th Avenue, Switlick and Sons, Pay Estimate #2
Item C: Cherry Street Lift Station Replacement, Integrity Grading and Excavating, Pay Estimate #6
Item D: Portland's Amended Concrete Licenses – Olsen Paving Inc., Concrete Creations of Wisconsin Inc., Concrete Solutions Inc.

discussions.body: A board member moved to approve the minutes from the June 30, 2026 regular meeting. A second was offered and the motion passed unanimously with no discussion.

discussions.item: Item A: 2025 Street Construction – Randolph Street/Cherry Street, Hawsuns Incorporated, Pay Estimate #10
discussions.body: A pay estimate of $41,264.82 was presented, with quantities verified by TJ and the project inspector. A motion to approve was made and seconded, passing unanimously with no discussion.

discussions.item: Item B: 2026 Street Construction Project B – North 8th Avenue, Switlick and Sons, Pay Estimate #2
discussions.body: A pay estimate of $193,967.79 was presented, with quantities and work reviewed by the project inspector and engineer. The motion to approve was made, seconded, and passed unanimously.

discussions.item: Item C: Cherry Street Lift Station Replacement, Integrity Grading and Excavating, Pay Estimate #6
discussions.body: A pay estimate of $91,755.88 was presented, with engineering firm Clark Deetz having inspected and verified completed quantities. The motion to approve was made, seconded, and passed unanimously.

discussions.item: Item D: Concrete Contractor License Applications – Olsen Paving Inc., Concrete Creations of Wisconsin Inc., Concrete Solutions Inc.
discussions.body: Three concrete contractor license applications were reviewed by a board member who moved to approve all three. The motion was seconded and passed unanimously with no discussion.

actionItems: Approved minutes from the June 30, 2026 Board of Public Works meeting
Approved Pay Estimate #10 to Hawsuns Incorporated in the amount of $41,264.82 for the 2025 Randolph Street/Cherry Street construction project
Approved Pay Estimate #2 to Switlick and Sons in the amount of $193,967.79 for the 2026 North 8th Avenue construction project
Approved Pay Estimate #6 to Integrity Grading and Excavating in the amount of $91,755.88 for the Cherry Street Lift Station Replacement
Approved concrete contractor licenses for Olsen Paving Inc., Concrete Creations of Wisconsin Inc., and Concrete Solutions Inc.

votes.item: Pay Estimate #6 – Integrity Grading and Excavating, $91,755.88
Concrete contractor licenses – Olsen Paving Inc., Concrete Creations of Wisconsin Inc., Concrete Solutions Inc.
votes.motion: Motion to approve all three license applications

title: Wausau Board of Public Works Meeting  - 7/8/26
